title: Toward the design of allosteric effectors: gaining comprehensive control of drug properties and actions
research_objectives: Design allosteric effectors with comprehensive control of drug properties
Demonstrate advantages of allosteric modulation over orthosteric inhibition
Establish design principles for allosteric drug discovery
Address challenges in allosteric site identification and mechanism understanding
Show how allosteric modulation improves drug selectivity and safety

research_scope.focus_area: Allosteric drug design and therapeutic development

allosteric_modulation_principles.definition: Ligand binding at distal site modulates protein function
allosteric_modulation_principles.advantage_over_orthosteric: Potentially greater selectivity and reduced toxicity

allosteric_design_advantages.modulation_range: Can titrate effect rather than complete inhibition
allosteric_design_advantages.selectivity_mechanism: Allosteric sites often more divergent than orthosteric
allosteric_design_advantages.combination_therapy: Can combine with orthosteric agents synergistically

design_framework.site_discovery: Identify allosteric binding sites via computational and experimental methods
